Hero.badge: Serbian businesses are overpaying for IT. We're here to fix that.
Hero.title: You Run the Business
Hero.subtitle: Big agencies overcharge, underdeliver, and lock you in. Solvera gives you modern tech, transparent pricing, and zero bull. We're two engineers who believe Serbian businesses deserve better.
Hero.ctaSecondary: See How We Save You Money

ProblemSection.title: The Problem Nobody Talks About
ProblemSection.subtitle: Serbian businesses are getting ripped off by IT companies. Here's how.

p1.title: 5-10x Markup on Development
p1.description: Large agencies charge enterprise prices for standard work. A website that should cost 500-1,500 EUR? They'll quote you 5,000-15,000.

p2.title: Monthly Fees for Nothing
p2.description: Paying 200-500 EUR/month for 'maintenance' on a site that needs a 15-minute update? That's not support — that's a subscription to being robbed.

p3.title: Outdated Tech Sold as Modern
p3.description: They sell you WordPress from 2015 and call it 'cutting-edge.' Meanwhile, your competitors are using AI and automation to move faster.

p4.title: Vendor Lock-in by Design
p4.description: Can't move your site? Can't access your code? That's not a feature — it's a trap designed to keep you paying forever.

solution.title: There's a Better Way
solution.point1: Transparent, fixed pricing — you know exactly what you're paying before we start
solution.point2: You own everything — your code, your data, your hosting. No lock-in, ever
solution.point3: Modern tech stack — Next.js, AI, automation. Not recycled WordPress templates
solution.point4: Direct access to the engineers who build your product. No middlemen, no account managers

ServicesOverview.title: What You Actually Need (at a Fair Price)
ServicesOverview.subtitle: The same services the big agencies sell — without the 10x markup and hidden fees

websites.title: Websites & Web Apps
websites.description: Stop paying thousands for cookie-cutter sites. We build fast, modern, SEO-optimized websites at a fraction of what agencies charge — and you own every line of code.

enterprise.title: Custom Business Systems
enterprise.description: Dashboards, SaaS platforms, internal tools. Enterprise quality doesn't require enterprise prices. We deliver the same caliber for a fraction of the cost.

ai.title: AI & RAG Chatbots
ai.description: Your competitors are already using AI. Custom chatbots that know your business inside out, reducing support costs by 50-70% while serving customers 24/7.

automation.title: Workflow Automation (n8n)
automation.description: Why pay an employee to do what n8n does for free? We build automations that connect your tools, eliminate manual work, and save you 40+ hours per week.

Projects.title: How We Help
Projects.subtitle: Typical scenarios where we make a difference for your business

project1.title: An Online Store That Sells
project1.description: Need an e-commerce platform? No need to wait months or pay agency prices. We build a modern store with payments, product management, and everything you need to start selling.

project2.title: AI Support That Never Sleeps
project2.description: Your customers are waiting for answers? We set up an AI chatbot that knows your business inside out and responds on your behalf — around the clock, no breaks, no sick days.

project3.title: Automation Instead of Manual Work
project3.description: Spending hours on copy-paste between tools? We connect your systems and automate repetitive processes so your team can focus on what actually brings value.

project4.title: Freedom From Legacy Systems
project4.description: Stuck with a system you can't change without paying someone who holds you hostage? We rebuild it, give you full code ownership and the freedom to choose.

Testimonials.title: The Moment They Realized
Testimonials.subtitle: What our clients say after finding out what IT should actually cost

testimonial1.quote: We were paying a big agency 400 EUR/month just for hosting and minor updates. Solvera moved us to a better setup for a one-time fee. I'm still angry at how long we overpaid.
testimonial1.name: Marko Petrovic

testimonial2.quote: They quoted us 12,000 EUR for a chatbot. Solvera built something better for a quarter of that price. The ROI was obvious within the first month.

testimonial3.quote: I didn't even know n8n existed. We had two people doing data entry that a free tool can automate. Solvera set it up in a week and saved us 1,500 EUR/month.
testimonial3.name: Stefan Nikolic

Services.title: Services & Real Pricing
Services.subtitle: Transparent rates. No hidden fees. No surprises. Here's what we do and what it actually costs.

websites.title: Websites & Web Apps
websites.description: You're probably paying too much for your website. Whether it's a new build or getting free from an agency that holds your site hostage — we deliver modern, fast, fully-owned websites at honest prices.
websites.comparison: Typical agency quote: 5,000-15,000 EUR. Our range: 500-3,000 EUR for the same (or better) result.

features.f1: Responsive design, all devices, all screen sizes
features.f2: SEO built in from day one — not a paid add-on
features.f4: CMS included — update content yourself, no monthly fee
features.f5: You own everything: code, domain, hosting

enterprise.description: Dashboards, SaaS platforms, internal tools, API integrations. 'Enterprise-grade' does not mean 'enterprise-priced.' We build scalable, production-ready systems without the bloated agency overhead.
enterprise.comparison: Big firms charge 20,000-50,000+ EUR. We deliver comparable quality starting from 3,000 EUR.

features.f1: Scalable architecture that grows with you
features.f5: Full documentation and source code handover

ai.title: AI Integration & RAG Chatbots
ai.description: Your competitors are already using AI. If you're not, you're falling behind. We build intelligent chatbots, document processors, and AI search that transform your customer experience — at prices that actually make sense.

features.f1: RAG chatbots trained on YOUR business data

features.f4: 24/7 customer support without hiring more staff
features.f5: Measurable ROI within the first month

automation.title: Workflow Automation via n8n
automation.description: Stop paying people to do what software can do instantly. n8n is a free, open-source automation platform. We set it up, connect your tools, and build workflows that save you dozens of hours every week.
automation.comparison: That employee doing manual data entry costs you 800-1,200 EUR/month. Our automation setup is a one-time fee starting from 500 EUR.

features.f1: Visual workflow builder — easy to understand and modify

About.title: About Solvera
About.subtitle: Two developers who got tired of watching Serbian businesses get ripped off by IT companies

story.title: Why We Started
story.p1: We saw it happening to everyone around us. Friends running small businesses, family members with startups, local shops trying to go digital — all being quoted absurd prices by IT agencies for basic work. 5,000 EUR for a simple website. 500 EUR/month for 'maintenance' that took 10 minutes. It made us angry.
story.p2: We're two engineers who've worked with modern tech stacks for years. We know exactly what things cost to build, and we know the industry is overcharging by 5-10x across the board in Serbia. So we started Solvera — to give businesses access to the same quality at honest prices. No corporate overhead. No account managers. Just engineers who write code and solve problems.

innovation.title: Modern Tech Only
innovation.description: No recycled WordPress templates from 2015. We use Next.js, AI, n8n, and the same tools Silicon Valley uses.

quality.title: No-Compromise Quality
quality.description: Affordable doesn't mean cheap. Every project gets the same engineering rigor we'd apply to our own products.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.description: Fixed pricing, open communication, no hidden fees. You see exactly what you're paying for, always.

partnership.title: Your Code, Your Data
partnership.description: Everything we build belongs to you. No lock-in, no hostage situations. Walk away whenever you want — but you won't want to.

member1.name: Milan Julinac
member1.bio: I build web apps that load fast, look professional, and deliver results. From idea to production — without unnecessary delays.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data
Privacy.intro: Solvera (hereinafter: "we", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your data in accordance with the Data Protection Act of the Republic of Serbia.

section1.title: What Data We Collect
section1.p1: We only collect data that you voluntarily provide through our contact form:
section1.p2: We do not use tracking cookies or third-party analytics tools.

section2.title: How We Use Your Data

items.i1: To respond to your inquiry or audit request
items.i2: To contact you regarding services you have requested

section2.p1: We never sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

section3.title: Data Storage & Security
section3.p1: Your data is stored on secure servers and only accessible by authorized members of our team. We retain data only as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected.
section3.p2: We implement technical and organizational safeguards to prevent unauthorized access, loss, or misuse of your data.

section4.title: Your Rights
section4.p1: Under the Data Protection Act, you have the right to:

items.i1: Request access to the data we hold about you
items.i4: Withdraw consent for data processing at any time

section4.p2: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at milanjulinac996@gmail.com.

section5.title: Contact
section5.p1: For any questions about privacy and data protection:

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.subtitle: Rules and conditions for using our services
Terms.intro: By using the solveradev.rs website and our services, you accept the following terms. Please read them carefully.

section1.title: About Us
section1.p1: Solvera is an IT company based in Novi Sad, Serbia. We provide software development, web application, AI integration, and business process automation services.

section2.title: Services
section2.p1: All services are provided based on individual contracts or fixed-price proposals. Scope of work, deadlines, and pricing are precisely defined before the project begins.
section2.p2: The free IT audit does not obligate you to use our services.

section3.title: Code Ownership
section3.p1: Upon project completion and final payment, the client receives full ownership of all delivered code, design, and documentation. Solvera retains no proprietary rights over the delivered work.
section3.p2: Open-source libraries and third-party tools used in the project retain their original licenses.

section4.title: Payment
section4.p1: Payment terms are defined in each individual contract or proposal. Typically, we require a deposit before starting work, with the balance due upon delivery.
section4.p2: All prices are in euros (EUR) and do not include VAT unless otherwise stated.

section5.title: Limitation of Liability
section5.p1: Solvera commits to providing services professionally and in accordance with agreed specifications. However, we do not guarantee specific business outcomes (sales increases, traffic growth, etc.).
section5.p2: Our total liability is limited to the amount the client has paid for the specific service.

section6.title: Intellectual Property
section6.p1: The content of this website (text, design, logo) is the property of Solvera and is protected by intellectual property laws of the Republic of Serbia.
section6.p2: Copying, reproduction, or distribution of website content without written permission is not permitted.

section7.title: Dispute Resolution
section7.p1: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Serbia. In case of a dispute, the parties agree to attempt amicable resolution first. If that is not possible, the courts in Belgrade shall have jurisdiction.

section8.title: Contact
section8.p1: For any questions about these terms:

Footer.description: Honest IT for Serbian businesses. Modern tech, fair prices, zero lock-in.
